name: ayontclaudian
description: ayontclaudian — embeds Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity, Kimi, Vibe (Mistral), Grok (xAI) and other coding-agent CLIs as AI collaborators in your vault, with a unified model picker, intelligent mid-chat provider switching, and one-click CLI installs. Your vault is their working directory: file read/write, search, bash, and multi-step agentic workflows.
author: Ayont
